roa.docketEntryComment: REQ TO ADD TO CALENDAR FOR PRE HEARING CONF ON PAROLE FILED

/CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/3000ADM/X:ADMITS VIOLATION #1, #2 AND #3/3000REIN/PAJ: 104 DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ON PAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS  VIOLATION/RESTITUTION TOBE ORDERED IN #21002956 IN DEPT, 11 ON 6-1-21/X: ENTER A TREATMENT PROGRAMTHROUGH DAPO (DEPT OF ADULT PAROLE     OPERATIONS/CTORD: STAY AWAY TERMSORDERED THROUGH THE ELECTRONIC MONITORING   ORDER DATED 3-30-21 ARE TO REMAIN IN EFFECT /SA2: 1545 EDDY STREET, FILLMORE CENTER COMPLEX, SF/X: STAY150 YARDS AWAY FROM ABOVE ADDRESS/ /X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 52DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL: PHC ON PAROLE/ /X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/VD: 5-19-21ACM ELIG IN DEPT 11/X: JUDGE IN PAROLE COURT TO SPEAK WITH JUDGE IN DEPT 11 RE: VACATING   COURT DATE/ /VD: 05-19-21 ACM ELIG/X: PAROLE PHC NEXT DATE/DOP/
/CAL: STATUS RE PAROLE/30    CACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENTELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOP/CONTD:STATUS RE PAROLE/DOP/

/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN FOR 040821 FAILURE TO APPEAR AND RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/NP/X: DEFENDANT REFUSES TO COME TO COURT,/CTORD:BENCH WARRANT DISCHARGED/CTORD:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/BAIL: 50000/CTORD: WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD:BENCH WARRANT CONTEMPT DISPOSITION AND ARRAIGNMENT/
/CAL:PHC AND PAROLE CASE STATUS/NP/X:PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR ALSO APPEARING/CONTD:STATUS OF #21002956 AND ISSUE BENCH WARRANT IS DEFENDANT FAILSTO APPEAR/

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/SAORD/SA2: 1545 EDDY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO/SA4: FILLMORE CENTER COMPLEX, SAN FRANCISCO/WEAP/RX/X: NO DRUGS USE WITHOUT PRESCRIPTION/ /CTORD:NO ALCOHOL CONSUMPTION OR MARIJUANA USE/X: PAROLE DIVISION TO PREPARE DOCUMENTATION CONSISTING OF A REPORT   RECOMMENDING ACTIONS TO BE TAKEN BY THEDA'S OFFICE AS IT RELATES TO  PAROLE REVOCATIONS; AND NOT PAROLE DIVISION //OR/X: ELECTRONIC MONITORING TO BE WITH AN INCLUSION ALERT/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THESHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH    ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEESIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: PHC AND PAROLE CASE STATUS NEXT DATE/DOP/
/CAL:PAROLE STATUS/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:THISMATTER WAS HEARD ON 05-25-21 IN DEPT, 31/
/CAL:BW CONTEMPT DISPO/BWDNC/BAIL:50000/CTORD:IN CUSTODY ACM REPORT/CONTD:STATUS RE PAROLE/DOP/
/CAL STATUS OF #21002956/X: PAROLE AGENT BRANDON LUGAR APPEARING/FTA/BWI/NB/X:PAROLE IS REVOKED,/BWNUM:1ST/NIGHTSERV/BWRET:31 ON A TUESDAY/
